| Test Case ID | Feature/Module     | Test Description                                                                                          | Precondition                                                                              | Test Steps                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Expected Result                                                                                                                                              | Actual Result | Pass/Fail Criteria                                                                                                                                                                          | Status   | Jira-Bug ID | Tester Name | Test Date  | Comments/Notes |
|--------------|--------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------|-------------|-------------|------------|----------------|
| TC-001       | Onboarding         |  Ensure the splash screen is displayed correctly and transitions smoothly to the choose language  screen. | Application should be installed                                                           | Launch the application.<br>Observe the splash screen.<br>Wait for the splash screen to transition to  the Choose Language screen<br>Select Desire language and press Confirm Button                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | The splash screen appears immediately after the app is launched.<br>The splash screen transitions to the choose language screens smoothly after 2-3 seconds. |               | Pass: If the splash screen displays correctly and transitions as expected.<br>Fail: If there are delays, crashes, or incorrect transitions.<br>                                             | Not Test |             |             | 2025-11-06 |                |
| TC-002       | Onboarding         | Ensure the user can navigate between onboarding screens smoothly                                          | The application is launched, and the onboarding screen is visible                         |  Press Next Button  on the first onboarding screen to navigate to the next screen.<br>Observe the behavior of the navigation dots.<br>On the last onboarding screen Press “Get Started” button.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |   Pressing the “Next”button should display the next onboarding screen..<br>The navigation dots correctly indicate the active screen.                         |               | Pass: If navigation between screens works smoothly and the dots update correctly.<br>Fail: If the “Next”button  does not navigate the screens or if navigation dots do not update properly. | Not Test |             |             |            |                |
| TC-003       | Onboarding         | Verify that the ""Get Started"" button redirects the user to the next appropriate screen.                 | The application is launched, and the onboarding screen is visible                         | Navigate to any onboarding screen.<br>Tap the ""Get Started"" button.<br>Observe the next action taken by the application.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Tapping the ""Get Started"" button redirects the user to the registration or login screen.<br>The button is responsive and visually updates when tapped.     |               | Pass: If tapping the button redirects correctly.<br>Fail: If the button is unresponsive or redirects to an incorrect screen.                                                                | Not Test |             |             |            |                |
| TC-004       | Onboarding         | Ensure all onboarding screens maintain proper alignment and consistent design.                            | The application is installed on multiple devices with varying screen resolutions          | Launch the app on different devices (e.g., phones, tablets).<br>Observe the alignment of text, buttons, and images on each onboarding screen.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | Text, images, and buttons are properly aligned and not overlapping.<br>No elements are cut off on any device screen.                                         |               | Pass: If the screens maintain visual consistency across devices.<br>Fail: If any visual elements are misaligned or broken.                                                                  | Not Test |             |             |            |                |
| TC-005       | Sign-In            | Verify that the user can successfully sign in using email and password.                                   | The user has an existing account with a valid email and password.                         | Launch the app and navigate to the sign-in screen.<br>Enter a valid email address in the ""Enter your email address"" field.<br>Enter the corresponding valid password in the ""Enter password"" field.<br>Tap the Sign In button.                                                                                                                                                                                                            | The user is successfully signed in and navigated to the home screen/dashboard.                                                                               |               | Pass: If the user is successfully signed in and directed to the home screen.<br>Fail: If the app displays an error or fails to redirect the user.                                           | Not Test |             |             |            |                |
| TC-006       | Sign-In            | Ensure the app displays appropriate error messages for invalid email or password.                         | The user has an account with valid credentials.                                           | Launch the app and navigate to the sign-in screen.<br>Enter an invalid email or password combination.<br>Tap the Sign In button.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | The app displays an error message such as ""Invalid email or password.                                                                                       |               | Pass: If the error message is displayed.<br>Fail: If the app crashes or allows the user to sign in with invalid credentials.<br>                                                            | Not Test |             |             |            |                |
| TC-007       | Social Sign-In     | Verify that the user can sign in using their Google account.                                              | The app is configured with Google authentication.<br>The user has a valid Google account. | Tap the Google button on the sign-in screen.<br>Select or enter a valid Google account.<br>Complete the authentication process.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | The user is successfully signed in using their Google account and directed to the home screen/dashboard.                                                     |               | Pass: If the sign-in is successful.<br>Fail: If the app displays errors or fails to authenticate.                                                                                           | Not Test |             |             |            |                |
| TC-008       | Social Sign-In     | Verify that the user can sign in using their Apple ID.                                                    | The app is configured with Apple authentication.<br>The user has a valid Apple ID.        | Tap the Apple button on the sign-in screen.<br>Complete the Apple ID authentication process.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | The user is successfully signed in using their Apple ID and directed to the home screen/dashboard.                                                           |               | Pass: If the sign-in is successful.<br>Fail: If the app displays errors or fails to authenticate.                                                                                           | Not Test |             |             |            |                |
| TC-009       | Password Recovery  | Ensure the user can recover their account using the ""Forgot your password?"" option.                     | The user has an account with a valid email address                                        | Tap the Forgot your password? link.<br>Enter the email address associated with the account.<br>Follow the recovery instructions sent via email.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | The user receives a password recovery email and can reset their password successfully.                                                                       |               | Pass: If the email is received and the user can reset their password.<br>Fail: If the recovery email is not received or the process fails.                                                  | Not Test |             |             |            |                |
| TC-010       | Sign-Up/Create New | Verify that tapping ""Create New"" navigates the user to the account creation screen.                     | None.                                                                                     | Tap the Create New link.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | The user is navigated to the account creation screen                                                                                                         |               | Pass: If the user is directed to the correct screen.<br>Fail: If the app displays an error or does not navigate correctly.                                                                  | Not Test |             |             |            |                |
| TC-011       | Account Creation   |  Verify that the user can successfully create an account with valid details.                              | The user has not already registered using the provided email.                             | Launch the app and navigate to the Create Account screen.<br>Enter a valid name in the ""Enter your name"" field.<br>Enter a valid email address in the ""Enter your email address"" field.<br>Enter a password meeting the requirements (e.g., at least one uppercase letter).<br>Re-enter the same password in the ""Confirm password"" field.<br>Check the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy checkbox.<br>Tap the Create Account button. | The user account is successfully created, and the user is redirected to the home screen/dashboard.                                                           |               | Pass: If the account is successfully created.<br>Fail: If the app displays an error or fails to redirect the user.                                                                          | Not Test |             |             |            |                |
| TC-012       | Account Creation   | Ensure the app enforces the password requirements (e.g., at least one uppercase character).               |                                                                                           | Enter all valid details except the password.<br>Enter a password without any uppercase letters.<br>Tap the Create Account button.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | The app displays an error message: ""Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.                                                                    |               | Pass: If the app displays the appropriate error message.<br>Fail: If the app allows the account to be created with an invalid password.                                                     | Not Test |             |             |            |                |

|              |                    |                                                                                                           |                                                                                           |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |                                                                                                                                                              |               |                                                                                                                                                                                             |          |             |             |            |                |
